info.title: Machine
info.description: Natural language processing tools with a focus on resource-poor languages.

commands.name: align
commands.description: Aligns parallel segments using a word alignment model.

options.name: --model-type
options.description:
The word alignment model type.
Types: "hmm" (default), "ibm1", "ibm2",
"ibm3", "ibm4", "fast_align".

options.name: --include
options.description:
The texts to include.
For Scripture, specify a book ID, "*NT*"
for all NT books, or "*OT*" for all OT
books.

options.name: --exclude
options.description:
The texts to exclude.
For Scripture, specify a book ID, "*NT*"
for all NT books, or "*OT*" for all OT
books.

options.name: --reference
options.description:
The reference alignments corpus.
If specified, AER and F-Score will be
computed for the generated alignments.

options.name: --normalization-form
options.description:
Normalizes text to the specified form.
Forms: "nfc", "nfd", "nfkc", "nfkd".

commands.name: build-corpus
commands.description: Builds a parallel corpus from source and target monolingual

options.name: --include
options.description:
The texts to include.
For Scripture, specify a book ID,
"*NT*" for all NT books, or "*OT*"
for all OT books.

options.name: --exclude
options.description:
The texts to exclude.
For Scripture, specify a book ID,
"*NT*" for all NT books, or "*OT*"
for all OT books.

options.name: --ref-output
options.description:
The segment reference output text
file.

options.name: --all-source
options.description:
Include all source segments.
Overrides include/exclude options.

options.name: --all-target
options.description:
Include all target segments.
Overrides include/exclude options.

options.name: --merge-duplicates
options.description:
Merge segments with the same
reference.

options.name: --normalization-form
options.description:
Normalizes text to the specified
form.
Forms: "nfc", "nfd", "nfkc", "nfkd".

commands.name: corpus-stats
commands.description: Computes statistics for a parallel corpus.

options.name: --include
options.description:
The texts to include.
For Scripture, specify a book ID, "*NT*"
for all NT books, or "*OT*" for all OT
books.

options.name: --exclude
options.description:
The texts to exclude.
For Scripture, specify a book ID, "*NT*"
for all NT books, or "*OT*" for all OT
books.

options.name: --count
options.description: Only output the # of parallel segments.

commands.name: extract-lexicon
commands.description: Extracts a lexicon from a word alignment model.

options.name: --model-type
options.description:
The word alignment model type.
Types: "hmm" (default), "ibm1", "ibm2",
"ibm3", "ibm4", "fast_align".

options.name: --direction
options.description:
The word alignment model direction.
Directions: "symmetric" (default),
"direct", "inverse".

options.name: --special-symbols
options.description: Include special symbols in the lexicon.

options.name: --threshold
options.description:
The probability threshold.
This threshold will override the beam
threshold if both are specified.

commands.name: suggest
commands.description:
Simulates the generation of translation suggestions during an
interactive translation session.

options.name: --model-type
options.description:
The word alignment model type.
Types: "hmm" (default), "ibm1", "ibm2",
"fast_align".

options.name: --include
options.description:
The texts to include.
For Scripture, specify a book ID, "*NT*"
for all NT books, or "*OT*" for all OT
books.

options.name: --exclude
options.description:
The texts to exclude.
For Scripture, specify a book ID, "*NT*"
for all NT books, or "*OT*" for all OT
books.

options.name: -n
options.description:
The number of suggestions to generate.
Default: 1.

options.name: --approve-aligned
options.description: Approve aligned part of source segment.

options.name: --normalization-form
options.description:
Normalizes text to the specified form.
Forms: "nfc", "nfd", "nfkc", "nfkd".

commands.name: translation-model
commands.description:
Trains a translation model from a parallel corpus.
Run 'train [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

options.name: --model-type
options.description:
The word alignment model type.
Types: "hmm" (default), "ibm1", "ibm2",
"fast_align".

options.name: --include
options.description:
The texts to include.
For Scripture, specify a book ID, "*NT*"
for all NT books, or "*OT*" for all OT
books.

options.name: --exclude
options.description:
The texts to exclude.
For Scripture, specify a book ID, "*NT*"
for all NT books, or "*OT*" for all OT
books.

options.name: --normalization-form
options.description:
Normalizes text to the specified form.
Forms: "nfc", "nfd", "nfkc", "nfkd".

commands.name: translate
commands.description:
Translates segments using a translation model.
Run 'machine [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

options.name: --model-type
options.description:
The word alignment model type.
Types: "hmm" (default), "ibm1",
"ibm2", "fast_align".

options.name: --include
options.description:
The texts to include.
For Scripture, specify a book ID,
"*NT*" for all NT books, or "*OT*" for
all OT books.

options.name: --exclude
options.description:
The texts to exclude.
For Scripture, specify a book ID,
"*NT*" for all NT books, or "*OT*" for
all OT books.

options.name: --reference
options.description:
The reference corpus.
If specified, BLEU will be computed
for the generated translations.

options.name: --normalization-form
options.description:
Normalizes text to the specified form.
Forms: "nfc", "nfd", "nfkc", "nfkd".
